CustomField.description: Formula field showing the current status of the associated Document
CustomField.formula:
CASE(TEXT(leaseworks__Transaction_Type__c) ,'MR Invoice', IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Invoice_Line_Item__c ) , leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Doc_Status__c , TEXT(leaseworks__Invoice_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Status__c)) ,'MR Invoice Reconciliation', TEXT(leaseworks__Invoice_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Status__c) ,'MR Invoice Overpayment Credit', leaseworks__Credit_Memo_Status__c ,'MR Cash Payment',IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__c) , leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Doc_Status__c , leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Status__c) ,'MR Payment Credit Applied',IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__c) , leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Doc_Status__c , leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Status__c) ,'MR Invoice Credit (Adjustment)',IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__c) , leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Doc_Status__c , leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Status__c) ,'MR Payment Offset',IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__c) , leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Doc_Status__c , leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Status__c) ,'MR Transfer',leaseworks__MR_Fund_Transfer_Status__c ,'MR Accrued',leaseworks__Utilization_Status__c ,'MR Claim Accrued',leaseworks__Claim_Status__c ,'MR Invoice Adjustment',TEXT(leaseworks__Invoice_Adjustment_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Invoice_Adjustment__r.leaseworks__Approval_Status__c), IF(!ISBLANK(leaseworks__Event_Payable__c),TEXT(leaseworks__Event_Payable__r.leaseworks__Status__c),IF(!ISBLANK(leaseworks__Event_Payout__c), TEXT(leaseworks__Event_Payout__r.leaseworks__Status__c),'')))
/** Below transaction types are covered in else of the case statement: 'MR Contribution Applied',TEXT(Event_Payable__r.Status__c) 'MR Contribution Used',TEXT(Event_Payable__r.Status__c) 'MR Claim',TEXT(Event_Payable__r.Status__c) 'MR Claim Refund',TEXT(Event_Payout__r.Status__c) 'MR Claim Offset',TEXT(Event_Payout__r.Status__c) 'MR Rebate',TEXT(Event_Payable__r.Status__c) 'MR Rebate Payout',TEXT(Event_Payout__r.Status__c) 'MR Manual Payable',TEXT(Event_Payable__r.Status__c) 'MR Manual Payout',TEXT(Event_Payout__r.Status__c) 'Payable- MR Reconciliationt',TEXT(Event_Payable__r.Status__c) 'Payout- MR Reconciliationt',TEXT(Event_Payout__r.Status__c) **/
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-calculated field, showing the source document status. Non-approved documents may not update the fund balance, therefore Amount field can be zero
CustomField.label: Document Status
